_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Evaluate factors such as reporting formats required, cost constraints, and need for security restrictions to determine hardware configuration.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating data platform technology options against requirements, including performance, scalability, cost, security, and operational complexity trade-offs.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-002 (AI, cosine: 0.499), RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.607). Shared vocabulary: [cost, security]. DCWF-only terms [configuration, constraints, determine, evaluate, factors, formats] vs WIDAI-only terms [against, complexity, data, evaluating, offs, operational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.887, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Evaluate factors such as reporting formats required, cost constraints, and need" and "Skill in evaluating data platform technology options against requirements, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.524 < STS 0.607 (gap -0.083). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [configuration, constraints, determine] and [against, complexity, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [cost, security]. DCWF-only: [configuration, constraints, determine, evaluate, factors, formats]. WIDAI-only: [against, complexity, data, evaluating, offs, operational].
